title: Builders Heaven
description:
Builders Heaven is a Modpack that is designed to enhance a creative players building experience.
It adds more than 20 mods to help with QOL and Building
body:
# Builders Heaven 
##  Builders Heaven 
### Builders Heaven Info
- **Builders Heaven** was created to enhance the average players building experience. We created this modpack with passion and pride and we plan on updating and adding new mods to it in the near future.
- **Builders Heaven** contains over 20 mods that add different things from QOL Improvement to New Decoration blocks.
### Builders Heaven Requirements
- **Builders Heaven** is a client side based modpack it is not sever based so do not attempt to play on a sever with this modpack.
- **Builders Heaven** also requires players to have the game updated to 1.21 as thats the version of the modpack,Fabric Loader also must be up to date.
### Common Questions
- **Why should i download it?** The modpack adds more than 20 mods from Biomes 'O' plenty to more less known mods.
- **Do i need a super PC to run it?** No you do not, but we recommend having the specs that it takes to run minecraft at a stable performance.
### Notes
- Sodium is installed with this modpack to help perfromance and improve the singleplayer experience, I plan on adding lithium later to this modpack for server-side but currently this modpack is fully client-side focused.
